title: Sincerelyuq's Overhaul
description: Sincerelyuq's Overhaul adds more than 20 unique structures and hidden wonders across all dimensions. Future updates will bring support for more Minecraft versions and expand the number of structures
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mi30aI3fne0" title="Проигрыватель YouTube" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Sincerelyuq's Overhaul
**Sincerelyuq's Overhaul is a vanilla-friendly world generation datapack that completely transforms your exploration experience across all three dimensions.** Instead of the same old boring landscapes, your journey through the Overworld, the Nether, and the End will now be filled with mystery, unexpected discoveries, and unique challenges.


The core idea of the project is to reward curious players. Many of the added locations are seamlessly integrated into the natural generation or hidden deep within the blocks, requiring you to dig deeper and explore more thoroughly.


### Key Features:

**20+ Unique Custom Structures:** Discover completely new, handcrafted locations scattered throughout the universe.

**Multi-Dimensional Overhaul:** New features and structures are carefully balanced and generated across all dimensions (the Overworld, the Nether, and the End).

**Natural Wonders & Hidden Rooms:** From beautiful, hidden Amethyst Pools buried deep underground to secret, sealed dungeons locked behind netherrack walls.

**Vanilla Style:** Everything is designed to feel like an official update, perfectly matching the classic Minecraft aesthetic.


### Future Plans:

This project is actively maintained and alive!** Future updates will bring:**
Expanded support for newer Minecraft versions.

Even more unique structures, natural features, and hidden puzzles.

### Commands:
/locate structure sincerelyuq:structure_name

### Credits: 
**Sincerelyuq and Hikitals**
